skills.title: Front-End Development
skills.description: Crafting stunning, responsive user interfaces using React, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, and Bootstrap. I bring pixel-perfect designs to life with smooth animations and seamless interactions across all devices.

skills.title: Back-End Development
skills.description: Building scalable server-side architectures with Node.js, Express, Python, and Flask. I design secure RESTful APIs, manage databases with MongoDB and SQL, and ensure fast, reliable performance.

skills.title: Mobile App Development
skills.description: Developing cross-platform mobile applications with React Native. From concept to deployment on iOS and Android, I build fast, native-feeling apps with beautiful UIs and smooth user experiences.

skills.title: Bug Fixing & Optimization
skills.description: Expert at identifying and resolving complex bugs efficiently. I optimize code performance, reduce load times, and implement best practices to deliver blazing-fast applications.

skills.title: Security & Best Practices
skills.description: Implementing industry-standard security practices including secure authentication, data encryption, input validation, and protection against common vulnerabilities like XSS and SQL injection.

skills.title: Full Stack Architecture
skills.description: Designing end-to-end application architectures from database schemas to frontend components. Experienced with Git version control, CI/CD pipelines, deployment, and agile development workflows.

portfolio.title: Classic Snake Game
portfolio.description: A modern take on the classic Snake game built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Players control a growing snake, testing reflexes and strategy in this engaging browser-based game.

portfolio.title: Sowl Coin White Paper
portfolio.description: Official white paper website for Sowl Coin cryptocurrency. Built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB — featuring interactive elements, clean design, and comprehensive tokenomics information.

portfolio.title: Runner Hunter 3D Game
portfolio.description: An immersive 3D endless runner game built with Three.js. Navigate through dynamically generated environments, dodge obstacles, and collect rewards in this visually stunning browser game.

portfolio.title: SaveReelify — Insta Downloader
portfolio.description: A powerful Instagram content downloader web app that lets users save reels, posts, and stories effortlessly. Built with a clean UI, fast downloads, and support for multiple media formats.

portfolio.title: Y2DPro — YouTube Downloader
portfolio.description: A feature-rich YouTube video downloader web app supporting multiple resolutions and audio formats. Simple paste-and-download interface with real-time progress tracking and batch download support.

portfolio.title: Car Tracker — Vehicle Monitoring
portfolio.description: A real-time car tracking mobile app built with React Native. Monitor vehicle location, speed, over-speeding alerts, battery health, and trip history — all from a sleek, interactive dashboard.

portfolio.title: SocialSphere — Social Media App
portfolio.description: A full-featured social media platform where users can upload content, follow others, like, comment, and share posts. Instagram & Facebook-inspired UI with real-time notifications and messaging.

testimonial.description: "Ashwin helped elevate my business with a stunning, user-friendly website optimized for our target audience. He took the time to understand our goals and provided invaluable insights to strengthen our online presence. Thrilled with the results!"

"Ashwin brought my vision to life with incredible creativity and technical skill. From start to finish, he maintained clear communication and delivered a website that not only looks great but performs exceptionally well. His dedication is unparalleled!"

"Working with Ashwin was an absolute pleasure. His attention to detail and ability to transform ideas into high-quality web and mobile projects are truly impressive. The seamless functionality went beyond my expectations. Highly recommended!"

"Ashwin built a fantastic mobile app for our startup. The UI was sleek, performance was smooth, and he delivered ahead of schedule. His understanding of React Native and backend integration is top-notch. Would definitely work with him again!"

"I hired Ashwin on Fiverr for a complex e-commerce project and he absolutely nailed it. Fast communication, clean code, and he even suggested improvements I hadn't thought of. Five stars all the way — a true professional!"

"Ashwin redesigned our entire web platform and the results speak for themselves — 40% increase in user engagement. He has an exceptional eye for modern design trends and knows how to translate them into functional, performant code."
